title: Fast Path Original
description: You run faster when running on a path (original from planetminecraft)
body:
This datapack(mod) allows you to run faster when you are running on a dirt path block.

When on a dirt path block this datapack(mod) gives you speed 1 effect for 1sec and every time you are on a path block it will continue. You wont even feel that.

must be working from 1.17 to all current versions.

This is the original mod from [PlanetMinecraft by Runterya(me)](https://www.planetminecraft.com/data-pack/fast-path/)
